news.title:
Mastek Ltd grants 6 lakh stock options under ESOP Plan VI & VII.
Options priced at Rs. 1000, vesting in 3-5 years, exercisable for 7 years.
news.summary:
Mastek Ltd grants 6 lakh stock options under ESOP Plan VI & VII.
Options priced at Rs. 1000, vesting in 3-5 years, exercisable for 7 years.

news.title:
Mastek wins £15M (Rs 185 Cr) 2-year contract with FCA for digital delivery improvement.
The deal may extend further, leveraging Mastek's specialized digital engineering skills.
news.summary:
Mastek wins £15M (Rs 185 Cr) 2-year contract with FCA for digital delivery improvement.
The deal may extend further, leveraging Mastek's specialized digital engineering skills.

news.title: Mastek Ltd's unit wins a 15 million euro contract with the Financial Conduct Authority.
news.summary: Mastek Ltd's unit wins a 15 million euro contract with the Financial Conduct Authority.

news.title:
Mastek Ltd schedules analyst and investor meets on March 17, 2026.
Meetings include Avendus Spark, Emkay Global; no UPSI will be shared.
news.summary:
Mastek Ltd schedules analyst and investor meets on March 17, 2026.
Meetings include Avendus Spark, Emkay Global; no UPSI will be shared.

news.title:
Mastek Ltd's credit ratings reaffirmed by ICRA; long-term rating ICRA AA (Stable).
Short-term rating ICRA A1 reaffirmed for bank facilities; details available on ICRA's website.
news.summary:
Mastek Ltd's credit ratings reaffirmed by ICRA; long-term rating ICRA AA (Stable).
Short-term rating ICRA A1 reaffirmed for bank facilities; details available on ICRA's website.

news.title:
Mastek wins £85M (₹1,040 Cr) contract with UK Home Office for AI-based Atlas platform.
The order is expected to increase Mastek's annual revenue by approximately 30%.
news.summary:
Mastek wins £85M (₹1,040 Cr) contract with UK Home Office for AI-based Atlas platform.
The order is expected to increase Mastek's annual revenue by approximately 30%.

news.title:
Mastek Ltd won a 5-year, £49m-£67m contract with the UK's Home Office.
The deal involves biometric system upgrades, maintenance, and a 2-year extension option.
news.summary:
Mastek Ltd won a 5-year, £49m-£67m contract with the UK's Home Office.
The deal involves biometric system upgrades, maintenance, and a 2-year extension option.

news.title:
Mastek Ltd secures a £49m contract with UK's Home Office for biometrics services, including DNA database enhancement.
Mastek's shares traded at Rs. 1588.55, with intraday high of Rs. 1634.95 and low of Rs. 1582.30 on BSE.
news.summary:
Mastek Ltd secures a £49m contract with UK's Home Office for biometrics services, including DNA database enhancement.
Mastek's shares traded at Rs. 1588.55, with intraday high of Rs. 1634.95 and low of Rs. 1582.30 on BSE.

news.title:
Zensar Technologies plans to acquire 18-20% stake in Mastek for $200M.
The total investment may increase to $400M if the deal progresses.
news.summary:
Zensar Technologies plans to acquire 18-20% stake in Mastek for $200M.
The total investment may increase to $400M if the deal progresses.

news.title:
Mastek's Q3 revenue rose 4.2% YoY to INR 905.7 cr, down 3.7% QoQ.
EBITDA margin improved to 16.1%, order backlog grew 18.4%, net cash hit INR 346 cr.
news.summary:
Mastek's Q3 revenue rose 4.2% YoY to INR 905.7 cr, down 3.7% QoQ.
EBITDA margin improved to 16.1%, order backlog grew 18.4%, net cash hit INR 346 cr.

news.title:
Mastek Limited hosted its Q3 FY26 earnings call, highlighting robust AI-driven productivity improvements and recognition as a leading Oracle partner globally.
Despite revenue decline due to seasonal furloughs and project delays, EBITDA margin improved by 60 bps to 16.1%, supported by cost efficiency and operational rigor.
news.summary:
Mastek Limited hosted its Q3 FY26 earnings call, highlighting robust AI-driven productivity improvements and recognition as a leading Oracle partner globally.
Despite revenue decline due to seasonal furloughs and project delays, EBITDA margin improved by 60 bps to 16.1%, supported by cost efficiency and operational rigor.

news.title:
Mastek is set to go ex-dividend on January 30, with a dividend of ₹8/share payable on February 17.
Mastek's trailing yield is 1.2% with a conservative 20% payout ratio, supported by earnings growth of 22% annually over 5 years.
news.summary:
Mastek is set to go ex-dividend on January 30, with a dividend of ₹8/share payable on February 17.
Mastek's trailing yield is 1.2% with a conservative 20% payout ratio, supported by earnings growth of 22% annually over 5 years.

news.title: Mastek projects steady-state effective tax rate of 25-26% in earnings call.
news.summary: Mastek projects steady-state effective tax rate of 25-26% in earnings call.

news.title:
Mastek expects stronger growth in FY27 compared to FY26, driven by US market improvement.
The company anticipates sustainable growth in the US market starting next year.
news.summary:
Mastek expects stronger growth in FY27 compared to FY26, driven by US market improvement.
The company anticipates sustainable growth in the US market starting next year.

news.title:
Mastek targets EBITDA margin of 16.5%-17% despite US expansion costs.
Higher subcontracting costs expected initially in US expansion strategy.
news.summary:
Mastek targets EBITDA margin of 16.5%-17% despite US expansion costs.
Higher subcontracting costs expected initially in US expansion strategy.

news.title:
Mastek expects steady bottom-line performance and aims for improvement.
The company shared this outlook during its recent concall update.
news.summary:
Mastek expects steady bottom-line performance and aims for improvement.
The company shared this outlook during its recent concall update.

news.title: Mastek reports Q3 revenue at 9B rupees, down from 9.4B rupees QoQ.
news.summary: Mastek reports Q3 revenue at 9B rupees, down from 9.4B rupees QoQ.

news.title: Mastek Ltd issued a press release and investor presentation.
news.summary: Mastek Ltd issued a press release and investor presentation.

news.title:
Mastek Ltd reported Q3FY26 revenue at Rs 905.7 crore, up 4.2% YoY, with EBITDA margins at 16.1%, up 60 bps QoQ. PAT rose 11.2% QoQ to Rs 108.4 crore.
Mastek closed 26 new AI deals, added 17 clients, and saw its 12-month order backlog grow 24.3% YoY to Rs 2,658.5 crore. Interim dividend declared at Rs 8/share.
news.summary:
Mastek Ltd reported Q3FY26 revenue at Rs 905.7 crore, up 4.2% YoY, with EBITDA margins at 16.1%, up 60 bps QoQ. PAT rose 11.2% QoQ to Rs 108.4 crore.
Mastek closed 26 new AI deals, added 17 clients, and saw its 12-month order backlog grow 24.3% YoY to Rs 2,658.5 crore. Interim dividend declared at Rs 8/share.

news.title: Mastek Ltd declares interim dividend of Rs 8/share, i.e., 160%, for FY 2025-26.
news.summary: Mastek Ltd declares interim dividend of Rs 8/share, i.e., 160%, for FY 2025-26.
